creator: horia@racoviceanu.com
text:
Created attachment 157636
pecl-scrypt.diff

* Change TEST_PLIST_FILES to use TESTDIR (attachment 157507)

- Bump PORTREVISION
- Replace STRIP_CMD with INSTALL_TARGET=install-strip
- Remove STACKPROTECTOR and STACKPROTECTORALL from options
- Add EXAMPLES and TEST to options

# portlint -AC
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: Makefile: new ports should not set PORTREVISION.
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.
